form.formComment: Resuming after three months. Finished off last preparation 2 of 11 starters at Fairyhouse January 15 over 3218m, slow track; 0.5 len behind I Am Lorenzo carrying 75.5kg at $2.50. Previously first up; 3 of 9 starters at Punchestown November 13 over 3319m, on heavy track; 2.75 len behind Luminous Light carrying 72kg at $2.40. Racing well and gets chance to repay followers here.

form.formComment: Last start won by 4.5 len Downpatrick on March 29 over 3922m defeating Dee's Lady with 75.5kg at $9 in a steeplechase. Before that pulled up at Leopardstown in the LR on February 2 over 4828m. Hard to fault on his recent run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-11). Last start won by 4.5 len Downpatrick on March 29 over 3922m defeating Dee's Lady with 75.5kg at $9 in a steeplechase. Before that pulled up at Leopardstown in the LR on February 2 over 4828m. Hard to fault on his recent run.

form.formComment: Comes off a 54 day let-up. Last start finished third in a small field at Thurles in the LR on February 19 over 4325m, 22 len behind Karia Des Blaises carrying 67.5kg at $2.50. Race before finished fourth of 8 starters at Naas in the G3 Finlay Ford At Naas Novice Steeplechase on January 25 over 4928m, on heavy track; 20 len behind Argento Boy carrying 66.5kg at $6.50. Prospects look very bright.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Freshened for 42 days. Fresh up after four months finished third in a small field at Leopardstown on March 3 over 3419m, 36 len behind Raffles Dolce Vita carrying 75.5kg at $19. Previously second-up won by 4 len Wexford on July 4 over 4224m defeating Noticebox carrying 75.5kg at $2.40 in a hurdle. Sure to play a big role.

form.formComment: Resumes. Finished off last preparation 11 of 20 starters at Fairyhouse November 29 over 4123m, 28 len behind Billy Lee Swagger with 72kg at $29. Previously first up; 3 of 10 starters at Galway August 3 over 3621m, slow track; 3.5 len behind Aspurofthemoment with 67kg at $15. Should be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Last outing pulled up at Fairyhouse in the LR on April 4 over 4224m. Before that finished third in a small field at this track on March 26 over 4123m, on slow going 24 len behind Kilbarry Saint carrying 73kg at $15. Hard to make a decent case.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-15). Last outing pulled up at Fairyhouse in the LR on April 4 over 4224m. Before that finished third in a small field at this track on March 26 over 4123m, on slow going 24 len behind Kilbarry Saint carrying 73kg at $15. Hard to make a decent case.

form.formComment: Second-up today. First-up after four months finished third of 9 runners at Downpatrick on March 29 over 3922m, 7 len behind Littlefoot with 75.5kg at $9.50. Previously second-up didn't finish the race at Navan on December 6 over 4123m. Will strip fitter and makes plenty of appeal.
